subtitle: Run the organization from the top: read the whole business first, then drop into a branch only when local action is needed.

branchScope.label: Active branch tools
branchScope.hint: Branch-specific tools will open for the selected branch while organization-wide pages stay at company scope.

overview.title: Owner overview
overview.description: {count, plural, =0 {No branches are visible yet.} one {1 branch in view with sales, close progress, menu winners, and team performance.} other {# branches in view with sales, close progress, menu winners, and team performance.}}
overview.monthCostsHint: Branch costs and company shared expenses this month
overview.branchPerformanceDescription: Review today’s movement, team coverage, and month-close status branch by branch.
overview.awaitingCloseHint: This branch has not closed the selected month yet.
overview.openOrdersNow: {count, plural, =0 {No open orders now} one {# open order now} other {# open orders now}}
overview.openStaffValue: {open, plural, =0 {0 open} one {# open} other {# open}} · {staff, plural, =0 {0 staff} one {# staff} other {# staff}}

priority.title: Priority
priority.openOrdersContext: {orders, plural, one {# order} other {# orders}} across {branches, plural, one {# branch} other {# branches}}
priority.monthCloseContext: {count, plural, one {# branch} other {# branches}} still open for {month}
priority.staffingContext: {count, plural, one {# branch} other {# branches}} without employees
priority.emptyBody: Orders, staffing, and close checks are quiet.

insight.label: Insight
insight.monthCloseTitle: Month close is blocking clean numbers
insight.monthCloseBody: {count, plural, one {# branch needs} other {# branches need}} closing before finance is reliable.
insight.staffingBody: {count, plural, one {# branch has} other {# branches have}} no employees yet.
insight.calmClosedBody: Branch close, staffing, and open order checks are in shape.
insight.calmBody: Keep an eye on today and close books when branches are ready.

payroll.peopleCount: {count, plural, =0 {No employees with approved hours} one {# employee with approved hours} other {# employees with approved hours}}
payroll.missingRates: {count, plural, one {# role rate is missing} other {# role rates are missing}}. Projection excludes those hours.
payroll.emptyBody: Payroll projection appears after attendance hours are approved and salary rates are configured.

empty.noSalesBody: Top menu items appear after customer orders are completed.
empty.noHoursBody: Top employees appear after monthly attendance is approved.
empty.noBranchesBody: Branches appear here when your organization has accessible restaurants.
empty.noBranchRevenueBody: Revenue ranking appears as branches complete sales.

restaurants.title: Restaurants
restaurants.description: This is the founder-owned surface for branch setup, branch identity, and cross-branch menu operations.
restaurants.branchCardHint: Branch menus stay independent first. Use this route to keep ownership clear before deeper branch refactors land.
restaurants.switchHint: Use the branch switcher in the header before opening branch-specific tools.

actions.branchSetupDescription: Create branches, switch active branch, and compare or copy menus.
actions.identityDescription: Manage branch contact details, tax defaults, and payment configuration.
actions.homepageDescription: Update the public-facing story, gallery, and homepage content for the active branch.

menu.title: Company menu
menu.description: Set the reusable categories and dishes once, then let branches inherit a clean starter menu before local overrides.

people.title: People
people.description: Control organization access and branch staffing from one owner surface while keeping branch employee operations explicit.
people.staffingDescription: See team size across branches, then jump straight into the branch team workspace when you need to hire, schedule, or correct attendance.
people.employeePermissionNotice: You can review organization access here, but your current role does not include employee visibility across branches.
people.accessDescription: Founder, finance, accountant, and branch manager access stays centralized and auditable here.
people.directoryDescription: Search all visible employees across branches before drilling into a specific branch team.

money.title: Money
money.description: Read the combined business first: month-close coverage, roll-up profit, and branch-by-branch finance drill-down.
money.orgCostsHint: Purchasing and expense totals from closed months
money.closeCoverageHint: Closed snapshots for the selected month
money.closeAttentionHint: {count} branches still need month close before the combined numbers are complete.
money.closeAttentionDone: Every visible branch has a closed snapshot for this month.
money.branchRollupDescription: Use the combined numbers to scan the business, then open one branch when you need to inspect or close that location.
money.awaitingCloseHint: No closed snapshot for this branch in the selected month.
money.branchDetailDescription: This is the selected branch workspace for month navigation, export, and close actions.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Founder-owned business settings should live here as identity, org defaults, and branch setup are moved out of the old dashboard.
settings.organizationDescription: Manage shared access and organization-level defaults.
settings.restaurantDescription: Keep branch identity, payment defaults, and tax defaults under founder control.
settings.homepageDescription: Control the public-facing story and branch presentation from a founder-owned surface.

stats.orderCount: {count, plural, =0 {0 orders} one {# order} other {# orders}}
stats.openOrdersCount: {count, plural, =0 {0 open orders} one {# open order} other {# open orders}}

charts.revenueEmpty: No completed orders in the last 14 days
charts.hoursSubtitle: Approved and pending attendance by employee
charts.hoursEmpty: No attendance hours recorded this month

bestSellers.title: Best sellers last 30 days
bestSellers.subtitle: Most sold items for this branch only
bestSellers.empty: No completed sales yet for this branch.

hoursSnapshot.title: Hours snapshot
hoursSnapshot.subtitle: Where to review working hours for this branch
hoursSnapshot.reviewBody: Open the team tab to see each employee’s weekly plan, month plan, approved hours, pending hours, and salary estimate for this branch.

finance.title: Branch finance
finance.description: Read the monthly report here, then open the branch finance workspace if you need the branch view in a separate tab.

team.employeeCount: {count, plural, =0 {0 employees} one {# employee} other {# employees}}
team.inviteHelp: The employee will receive an email to set their password and access the branch.
team.emptyDescription: Add your first team member above.
team.rosterDescription: Founders can review schedules, approved hours, and salary estimates without leaving control.

setup.readyBanner: Saving this setup will mark the branch ready for operations.
setup.basicInfoHint: Keep the branch identity and contact details up to date for owner-controlled setup.
setup.regionalHint: These defaults shape local finance, language, and reporting for this branch.
setup.openingHoursHint: Keep the public hours and branch defaults accurate without leaving owner control.
setup.roleRatesHint: Set branch pay rates here so payroll estimates stay out of the daily team workspace.

cards.staffOnBranch: {count, plural, =0 {0 staff on this branch} one {# staff on this branch} other {# staff on this branch}}
cards.allRatesReady: All active roles have pay rates set

rates.title: Role hourly rates
rates.description: Set one rate per staff level so payroll can estimate month-end salary automatically.
rates.appliesHint: Applies to approved hours for this role
rates.footerHint: Hours come from approved attendance summaries, not planned shifts.

schedule.title: Schedules and salary view
schedule.description: Weekly roster, approved hours, and payroll estimate in one view.
schedule.staffCount: {count, plural, =0 {0 staff} one {# staff} other {# staff}}
schedule.empty: No staff added to this branch yet.

toasts.invalidRate: Enter a valid hourly rate for {role}
